codeReview.summary: The feature delivers the requested type files and realistic mock dataset coverage, but the declared and instantiated timestamp fields use Date objects rather than JSON-serialized strings, so the mock shape is not an exact match for GET /api/actions responses. The commit also includes unrelated documentation artifacts.

issues.description: ActionCard declares snoozedUntil/createdAt/completedAt as Date values (see lines 25, 27, 28), and mock-actions instantiates Date objects. GET /api/actions is a JSON response, so timestamp fields serialize to strings. This violates the feature requirement that mock data shape must exactly match the API response shape.
This feature commit includes additional .factory documentation files unrelated to the scope (also .factory/validation/phase2-cross-area/assertions.md). Requested scope was types plus mock data only.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill enforces a strict RED-first step, but this feature is static type and data work with no behavioral logic. The worker deviated and documented it as intentional.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false with deviation on step 2 Write Tests First RED; backend-worker SKILL.md currently has no explicit exception for types-only or static-data features.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature commits can pick up unrelated mission and documentation artifacts, and mission-level guidance does not explicitly constrain this for narrow-scope implementation features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git show --stat 6e39b36 includes .factory/docs/phase2-backend-validation-assertions.md and .factory/validation/phase2-cross-area/assertions.md in addition to the three requested implementation files.

summary: Review failed due to API-shape mismatch in timestamp typing and mock representation (Date objects vs JSON string response shape). Core coverage of requested types and realistic mock records is otherwise present.
